title: PrivaRAG — 100% Local Document Intelligence Platform
description:
PrivaRAG is a production-ready, fully self-hosted Retrieval-Augmented Generation system designed for organisations that need complete data privacy and GDPR compliance. Upload documents, query them in natural language — nothing leaves your server.

Architecture: React frontend (Vite, Claude Design) + FastAPI backend with LangChain RAG pipeline, Qdrant vector database for semantic search, Ollama for local LLM inference, BAAI/bge-m3 multilingual embeddings (29 languages supported), PyMuPDF + Tesseract OCR for document ingestion (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, TXT, MD, ODT, RTF, HTML, XML). JWT authentication with role-based access control (User / Super User / Admin). Per-conversation document isolation. Automatic backup to 70+ cloud providers via rclone. Fully containerized via Docker Compose with single-command installation.

Compliant by design with GDPR and the EU AI Act. Zero data leaves the server.
